valueSection.title: Design that proves its value
valueSection.subtitle: At Echocode, we don’t just find bugs. Our QA department is the guardian of product quality. We are looking for a specialist who understands the business value of a stable release and isn’t afraid to take responsibility for the final result.

descriptionSections.title: What will you be working on?

values.title: End-to-end Quality:
values.desc: Participation in the formation of product strategy together with CEO and engineers.

values.title: Conversion Design:
values.desc: Creating and testing interfaces that increase LTV and conversions.

values.title: RATEDesign System:
values.desc: Support and development of a scalable design system in Figma.

values.title: RATEUser Feedback:
values.desc: Feedback analysis and iterative UX improvement.

values.title: Understanding psychology
values.desc: User and the principles of behavioral economics.

values.title: Knowledge of technical limitations of platforms
values.desc: What is easy for a developer to implement and what is not.

values.title: Ability to justify design decisions
values.desc: Every decision has a hypothesis, data, and a clear impact on the user and the business.

values.title: Willingness to delve into numbers and product metrics
values.desc: We work with conversions, flows, and funnels, not just aesthetics.

values.title: High level of autonomy
values.desc: The ability to independently lead a task from idea to measurable result.

selectionSection.title: Step 01
selectionSection.subTitle: Portfolio Review
selectionSection.desc: We evaluate thinking, decision logic, and the real impact of design.

selectionSection.title: Step 02
selectionSection.subTitle: Design Challenge
selectionSection.desc: We check how you formulate hypotheses and work with constraints.

selectionSection.title: Step 03
selectionSection.subTitle: Interview
selectionSection.desc: A conversation with the product team about approach, process, and collaboration.

selectionSection.title: Step 04
selectionSection.subTitle: Offer
selectionSection.desc: Transparent offer and start of cooperation without unnecessary steps.
